full_text:
Zhuge Shao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Shaowas born in Yangdu in Langxie. Warned his father what his actions would lead him to. Executed when father was overthrown. Zhuge Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhuge Shao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
